commander.description: Coordinates multi-step coding tasks — features, bug fixes, refactors — by delegating to planner, implementer, tester, and reviewer in sequence.

planner.description: Breaks down tasks into a sequence of steps, each with a clear goal and expected output. Delegates to implementer, tester, and reviewer as needed.

implementer.description: Writes code to implement a single step of a task. Delegates to tester and reviewer as needed. Edits code only, never tests.

tester.description: Runs the test suite and writes missing tests for new or changed logic. Reports pass/fail with failure details. Edits test files only, never application code.

reviewer.description: Reviews diffs against project conventions — naming, error handling, security basics. Read-only, flags issues rather than fixing them.

documenter.description: Updates AGENTS.md only when architecture changes occur. Read-only — never edits application code. Runs as a subagent delegated by the commander agent.
